Essential British Free Range Semi-Skimmed Milk 4 Pints

£1.75 77p/litre
Essential Waitrose British free range semi-skimmed milk. Sourced from British farms where cows have access to graze outdoors.
INGREDIENTS: semi skimmed milk.
